subject: [DMAAP] Use common aaf template in dmaap-dr-prov
commit_message:
[DMAAP] Use common aaf template in dmaap-dr-prov

Instead of copy-pasting code around aaf_agent usage let's use a common
template that automates this.

Issue-ID: AAF-1134
Change-Id: I266017e4acbcdac89a31dfba775380fd5cd9acfe
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>

> Patch Set 3: Code-Review+2

> waiting for DMaaP team +1

@Sylvain
I'm not sure if you took a look what's the difference with the previous patchset that was not working so let me warn you to not make the same stupid mistake that I did. When you copy-paste the item in requirements.yaml make sure to update also the chart alias. Otherwise the chart is included 2 times which leads to enormous amount of errors that you don't ever expected:D
